summary: Created block_generator.py - standalone orchestrator for block generation with /zo/ask, retries, graceful failure handling, and manifest logging.

options.--blocks: Comma-separated block codes to override smart selection
options.--retry: Specific blocks to retry (regenerates even if done)

features.prompt_loading: Loads from Prompts/Blocks/Generate_{block}.prompt.md with fallback for variants
features.api_retries: Configurable retry count with exponential backoff (default 5s delay)
features.manifest_logging: Tracks blocks_generated, blocks_failed, and full generation_history
features.graceful_failures: Continues processing remaining blocks on single-block failure
features.status_tracking: Shows selection method, recipe, generated/failed counts
features.dry_run: Preview mode to see what would be generated

data_classes.GenerationResult: Per-block result with status, attempts, duration, errors

test_results.notes: All options documented, usage examples clear
Shows generated/failed blocks and selection metadata
Structured output with per-block results and metadata

design_decisions: Standalone script rather than modification of process.py - cleaner separation of concerns
Uses dataclasses (GenerationResult, GenerationSession) for structured output
Manifest tracks full generation_history array for debugging/audit
Retry logic at two levels: API retries per block, and --retry flag for re-running failed blocks
Truncates transcript at 30k chars (~7500 tokens) to stay within context limits
observations: Existing manifests in Personal/Meetings/ have varied legacy formats - script handles both old and new block_selection structures
Prompt templates use YAML frontmatter + markdown format consistently
BLOCK_INDEX.yaml provides rich metadata for future enhancements (priority_relevance, output_length_guide)
notes_for_orchestrator: Script ready for use. Recommend V do a live test with a real meeting to validate prompt quality and tune generation parameters. The --dry-run flag allows safe preview before committing tokens.
